r 1313

PAP 2 ME 14 KALA :" u ⸢1? ME? 32?⸣ 3(AŠ)v :" u 2 ⸢ME? 40?⸣ 2(AŠ) u 1 lim 59v [...]

Total: 2 hundred 14 full growns : and 1 hundred 32 3-year-olds : and 2 hundred 40 2-year-olds and 1 thousand 59 [...].

r 1414

PAP-ma 2 lim 2 ME 1.31 UDU-ḪI.A-MEŠ ⸢ina⸣ x qa-⸢la?⸣-[...]

In all: 2 thousand 2 hundred 1 sixty, 31 sheep in ... [...].

r 1515

2 KUR 2(AŠ) ⸢4⸣ DUMU MU PAP 6 NITA₂-MEŠ 8 EME₅ [...]

2 2-year-old horses, 4 yearlings; total: 6 males, 8 she-asses [...].

r 1616

⸢4⸣ ANŠE 2(AŠ) 4 DUMU MU PAP ⸢8v⸣ NITA₂ 15 EME₅ x [...] x ⸢NA? A⸣ [...]

4 2-year-old donkeys, 4 yearlings; total: 8 males, 15 she-asses ... [...] ... [...].

r 1717

8v GU₄ KALA 3 3(AŠ)v 3 [2(AŠ)] 2 ⸢DUMU MU⸣ [...]-ri-di

8 full grown oxen, 3 3-year-olds, 3 [2-year-olds], 2 yearlings [...]... .

r 1818

8v 4 3(AŠ)v 3 2(AŠ) 4 DUMU [MU ...] KALA 2 3(AŠ)v 5 2(AŠ) [...] MA? RA MU 3 BE1

8 (erasure), 4 3-year-olds, 3 2-year-olds, 4 yearlings [...] full growns, 2 3-year-olds, 5 2-year-olds [...] ... 3 ... .

r 1919

2 KALA-MEŠ 4 2(AŠ) 5 A x [...] x KALA-MEŠ 3 2(AŠ) 2 DUMU MU [...] ⸢GAL?⸣ KI? DIŠ

2 full growns, 4 2-year-olds, 5 ... [...] n full growns, 3 2-year-olds, 2 yearlings [...] ... .

r 2020

PAP 19v GU₄ KALA

Total: 19 full grown oxen.

1There's an erasure after the number 8.

1 Another eponym list has ...-šarru -..., while the annals name Ilu-napišti-uṣur (cf . Millard 2000 : 24).

2 Listed in PNA under Nergal?-ṣarmi . However , the reading is uncertain.

3 Two versions of the eponym list name Šamaš-belu-uṣur.

4 Aššur-ilaʾi and Inurta-ilaʾi are also attested as eponym for 861 BC.

5 This eponym is listed as Šep-šarri in another eponym list.

6 Another list names Aššur-bunaya-uṣur.

7 Three lists have Bel-bunaʾi.

8 Most eponym lists have Adad-uballiṭ for the year 785 BC , one has Marduk-šarru-uṣur.

9 Most eponym lists have Marduk-šarru-uṣur for the year 784 BC , one has Adad-mušammir.

10 Most eponym lists have Šamši-ilu or Šamaš-ilu for the year 780 BC.

11 Mostly Nabu-kenu-uṣur.

12 Inurta-iddin , eponym for the year 757 , is omitted in this list.
